endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Storage.Admin/farms/{farmId}/storageaccounts
endpoints.description: Returns a list of storage accounts.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{FARMID}} with a real farmid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Storage.Admin/farms/{farmId}/storageaccounts/{accountId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{FARMID}} with a real farmid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Storage.Admin/farms/{farmId}/storageaccounts/{accountId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{FARMID}} with a real farmid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{ACCOUNTID}} with a real accountid.
